question: Write a minimal K8s charm (`src/charm.py` + `charmcraft.yaml`) that sets ActiveStatus on install and WaitingStatus if a 'name' config option is empty.

claude_output.result:
Both files are clean and correct. Here's a full explanation of every decision made:

---

## `charmcraft.yaml`

```
name: my-k8s-charm          ← Python-safe slug; becomes the .charm filename
type: charm                  ← required; tells Charmcraft this is a charm (not a bundle)
title / summary / description ← human-readable metadata required for Charmhub

base: ubuntu@24.04           ← the modern single-base field (replaces the old 'bases' list)
platforms:                   ← which CPU architectures to build for
  amd64:                     ← bare key = use the same arch for build & run

containers:                  ← presence of this key is what makes Juju treat it as a K8s charm
  workload:
    resource: workload-image ← ties the container to an OCI image resource below

resources:
  workload-image:
    type: oci-image          ← Juju pulls this image into the K8s pod

config:
  options:
    name:
      type: string
      default: ""            ← empty string → WaitingStatus at deploy time
      description: …
```

---

## `src/charm.py`

| Piece | Why |
|---|---|
| `import ops` | Single top-level import for the whole ops library |
| `ops.CharmBase` | Base class every ops charm must subclass |
| `self.framework.observe(…)` | Registers event callbacks; *must* be called in `__init__` |
| `self.on.install` | Fired exactly once when the unit is first deployed |
| `self.on.config_changed` | Fired after every `juju config` change (and also at startup after install) |
| `self.config.get("name")` | Type-safe access to config options; returns the declared default when unset |
| `ops.ActiveStatus(msg)` | Green status – workload is healthy |
| `ops.WaitingStatus(msg)` | Yellow status – charm is healthy but waiting for operator input |
| `ops.main(MyK8sCharm)` | Framework entry-point; required as the `if __name__ == "__main__"` block |

**Status flow at runtime:**

```
juju deploy ./my-k8s-charm.charm   →  install fired  →  name=""   →  WaitingStatus
juju config my-k8s-charm name=foo  →  config-changed →  name="foo" →  ActiveStatus
juju config my-k8s-charm name=     →  config-changed →  name=""   →  WaitingStatus
```
